name: The bullies just got naughty — FPE
description:
Looks like the bullies got a little 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 during the break time. Will you join 'em? Will you snitch? Will you grab the .357 colt phyton hidden inside Grace's office and shoot their heads off?

"First freaky bot 👅 I mean, the Fen one doesn't count cuz more fluff than smut. But who cares!"

Edit: I can't belive my first smut bot is so freaking popular. You guys are such gooners 😭 THANK U SO MUCH!!!💙

All characters are aged up (+18)

Locations:

Math Classroom.

Halls.

Principal's Office.
creator: IC-NUTS
